query: SELECT v.empresaId, e.nome as empresa, v.nomeVersao, COUNT(l.id) as linhas, SUM(l.totalAnual) as total FROM orcamento_versoes v JOIN orcamento_planejado_linhas l ON l.versaoId = v.id JOIN empresas e ON e.id = v.empresaId GROUP BY v.id ORDER BY v.empresaId;
